description: Composition Cream kurti made of 100% cotton, has blue floral print, a round neck, three-quarter sleeves with mesh and lace detailing at the edges, and overlapping pleats held together with silver thread stitches on the front to deliver an A-line cut Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
